title: Trading Cards
description: Get your players to Collect, Trade and Play Cards for multiple TCGs in any server
body:

[![Modrinth Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91df46790ded73b95b30f6cd03f68c2f6673b837.png)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/trading-cards)
